problems_encountered.description: First attempt with example.com email failed with 400 error. Successful with mailinator.com email.

tool_response_summary: Successfully created invitation for claude-test-eval@mailinator.com with member role. Invite ID: c745bf3a-f38d-425b-8316-4007c3ec810f
execution_notes: Tool executed successfully in 578ms after email format adjustment. API rejects example.com domain but accepts mailinator.com. Tool properly returns inviteId for subsequent operations like revocation.
